title: Walk/Bike to work/school
description: Swap a car trip with active transit today.

title: Unplug Standby Appliances
description: Unplug devices not in use to save phantom load.

title: Compost Waste
description: Properly compost kitchen scraps instead of throwing them away.

title: Zero Single-Use Plastics
description: Use only reusable bags, bottles, and containers.

title: Turn off lights in empty rooms
description: Keep electricity usage to a minimum.
